title: Respiratory Therapist
description: Cleveland Clinic, one of the nation's top healthcare systems, seeks a licensed Respiratory Therapist to provide critical respiratory care across our Indianapolis facility. You'll manage ventilators, administer aerosol medications, and support patients with respiratory conditions in ICU, general care, and emergency settings. Join our mission-driven team dedicated to exceptional patient outcomes.
responsibilities: Evaluate patients and initiate appropriate respiratory therapy protocols
Manage and monitor mechanical ventilation systems and patient response
Administer aerosol medications and perform chest physiotherapy
Collect and analyze blood gas samples to assess respiratory status
Educate patients and families on breathing exercises and respiratory hygiene
Collaborate with physicians and nursing staff on treatment plans and adjustments

requirements.education: Associate degree in Respiratory Therapy from an accredited program
certifications: Current RRT or CRT licensure required

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
Tuition reimbursement and continuing education support
